utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I did not even realise how late it was , until I noticed the 5 o clock shadow on her head .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Anyway , she did not want to stay .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I called a cab . she just left .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Ohh ! Thank you ! I like mail .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: It is just some things I have been thinking about .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Some things about us , and before we can even think about the two of us getting back together , I just need to know how you feel about this stuff .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Okay . Wow , it is ... it is 5 : 30 in the morning . So , I would better get cracking on this baby .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well , I will be waiting for you , just come up when you are done .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Okay , I will be up in , 18 pages . Front and back . Very exciting .

emotion_cause.span: 9_I will be waiting for you , just come up when you are done .
